---
description: Legacy LLM rules file. The canonical repo-wide policy lives in AI_POLICY.md.
applyTo: '**/*'
---

Read [AI_POLICY.md](../../AI_POLICY.md) first. It is the canonical repo-wide policy for all AI assistants in this repository.

Do not rely on this legacy file for model routing or gateway rules. If it conflicts with `AI_POLICY.md`, the policy file wins.
